patterns.name: Starbucks Japan
patterns.notes: Wi2 operated. Requires pre-registration or SNS login. Session: 1 hour.

patterns.name: McDonald's Japan
patterns.notes: Email or SNS registration required. Session: 60 min.

patterns.name: Lawson Free WiFi
patterns.notes: Email registration valid for 1 year. Session: 60 min, 5 times/day.

patterns.name: JR East Free WiFi
patterns.notes: NTT-BP operated. Email only, no SNS login. Session: 3 hours.

patterns.name: Tokyo Metro Free WiFi
patterns.notes: NTT-BP operated. Email or SNS login. Session: 3 hours. Station WiFi only.

patterns.name: Toei Subway Free WiFi
patterns.notes: NTT-BP operated. Same platform as Tokyo Metro and JR East.

patterns.name: Narita Airport
patterns.notes: No registration needed. Just agree to terms. Available at T1, T2, T3.

patterns.name: Haneda Airport
patterns.notes: Wi2 operated. Session: ~5 hours. Signal may be weak in some areas.

patterns.name: 7-Eleven Japan WiFi
patterns.notes: Email registration required. Session: 60 min, 3 times/day.

patterns.name: FamilyMart WiFi
patterns.notes: Email registration required. Session: 20 min, 3 times/day.

patterns.name: Kansai International Airport
patterns.notes: No registration needed. Available at T1, T2.

patterns.name: Fukuoka Airport
patterns.notes: No registration needed. Domestic and international terminals.

patterns.name: Chubu Centrair International Airport
patterns.notes: No registration needed. Available throughout the airport.

patterns.name: Tully's Coffee WiFi
patterns.notes: Wi2 operated. Email registration. Session: 60 min.

patterns.name: Doutor Coffee WiFi
patterns.notes: Wi2 operated. Email registration. Session: 60 min.

patterns.name: d Wi-Fi (NTT docomo)
patterns.notes: Requires d-account (docomo ID). Available at convenience stores, cafes, stations.

patterns.name: au Wi-Fi
patterns.notes: Requires au ID. Available at cafes, stations, shopping centers.

patterns.name: SoftBank Wi-Fi Spot
patterns.notes: Requires SoftBank/Y!mobile account. Available at cafes, stations, airports.
